content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Number of 1 Bits". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/number-of-1-bits/
constraints: The input is a 32-bit unsigned integer.
content.inputFormat: The function takes an integer n as input.
content.outputFormat: The function returns the number of 1 bits in the binary representation of n.

solution.approach: Use bitwise operations to count the number of 1 bits.
